item.title: The Disturbing and Brutal Case of Mary Collins
item.description: A factual overview of the Mary Collins case, presenting key details from the investigation with sensitivity and respect for those involved.

media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the Mary Collins case, presenting key details from the investigation with sensitivity and respect for those involved.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: The Disturbing Discovery Behind the Jonathan Gerlach Case
item.description: An overview of the Jonathan Gerlach case, presenting key facts and findings from the investigation in a factual and respectful way.

media:content.media:description: An overview of the Jonathan Gerlach case, presenting key facts and findings from the investigation in a factual and respectful way.

item.title: What do you believe their true motive was for murdering David?
item.description: A look into the investigation surrounding David’s murder, exploring possible motives and the facts uncovered by authorities in a respectful, factual manner.

media:content.media:title: What do you believe their true motive was for murdering David?
media:content.media:description: A look into the investigation surrounding David’s murder, exploring possible motives and the facts uncovered by authorities in a respectful, factual manner.

item.title: A Shocking Crime: The Derek Rosa Story
item.description: A factual overview of the Derek Rosa case, detailing the shocking crime, investigation, and key developments surrounding the events.

item.title: Channon and Chris Suffer a Living Nightmare Before the End
item.description: A factual look at the tragic case of Channon and Chris, summarizing the events, investigation, and the impact of this devastating story.

media:content.media:title: Channon and Chris Suffer a Living Nightmare Before the End
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the tragic case of Channon and Chris, summarizing the events, investigation, and the impact of this devastating story.
